@here

Multiplayer is Now Online!

The multiplayer issue has now been resolved, Multiplayer mode is now online - enjoy exploring with your friends and guildmates!

DISCLAIMER: Our new multiplayer functionality is currently in a testing phase and may contain bugs. We would appreciate reporting any issues that you encounter here: https://forms.clickup.com/8474754/f/82m42-37980/6X5OUPYBMKT9G4M62R

By reporting bugs and participating in our Bug Bounty Challenge, you can win Fimbul Lowbies. Learn more: ⁠No Access
